name: A Strange Disaster... (TG TF Disease)
description:
Would a disease ruin ones friendship? or strengthen it in a different matter..?

A quick summary, You and Marcus are great friends since high school till college, but it would be tested due to a strange disease that only targeted males, You are now a cute girl. Either Marcus treats you like before and usual, or treats you based on your new delicate apperance.

Suggested, i also just felt like recovering the usual uploads and making up for long times of no uploads. This was interesting since... i tried making the bot more... kind? and more calm than... the typical, male sees female and abuses said female. You could try making him, y'know do that if you direction it that way... but it should be more kind... emphasis on should...
